popularPicksSafeway.name: Hass avocados
popularPicksSafeway.explanation: 99¢ each — about 26% cheaper than Costco; for about Costco's 6-pack price, you can get roughly 8 at Safeway.

popularPicksSafeway.name: Berries
popularPicksSafeway.explanation: Best on blackberries at about 30% cheaper than Costco; raspberries and blueberries also look 15–20% cheaper.

popularPicksSafeway.name: Chobani yogurt
popularPicksSafeway.explanation: Cheaper than Costco; with the 4-pack deal, Costco's 16-pack price gets you almost 22 at Safeway.

popularPicksSafeway.name: Frozen shrimp
popularPicksSafeway.explanation: Friday-only: Frozen shrimp is about 30% cheaper than Costco.

popularPicksSafeway.name: Bell peppers
popularPicksSafeway.explanation: Friday-only: Bell peppers are about 30% cheaper than Costco.

popularPicksSafeway.name: Nestlé Drumstick ice cream
popularPicksSafeway.explanation: Friday-only: about 17% cheaper than Costco, plus a variety win.

popularPicksSafeway.name: Pork shoulder ribs
popularPicksSafeway.explanation: About 21% cheaper than Costco — one of the stronger meat-counter comparisons.

popularPicksSafeway.name: Oreo / Nabisco snacks
popularPicksSafeway.explanation: Good time to buy Oreos; the smaller Safeway buy is close enough to Costco that variety matters.

popularPicksSafeway.name: Doritos / snack bags
popularPicksSafeway.explanation: Friday-only: close to Costco pricing, but Safeway wins on smaller bags and flavor variety.

popularPicksSafeway.name: Beef chuck short ribs
popularPicksSafeway.explanation: Not an exact same-grade match, but Safeway looks cheaper across the comparable Costco short rib options.

popularPicksSafeway.name: Sargento cheese
popularPicksSafeway.explanation: Down to nearly a third of regular retail pricing.

popularPicksSafeway.name: Oreo variety angle
popularPicksSafeway.explanation: Costco may be a little cheaper on bulk, but with a gap under 10%, Safeway wins on smaller buy and variety.

popularPicksVons.name: Cheez-It crackers
popularPicksVons.explanation: $5 Friday win: grab the bigger Cheez-It boxes and Vons can beat Costco by around 30% per ounce, with way more flavors to choose from.

popularPicksVons.name: Post cereal
popularPicksVons.explanation: Post cereal is 3 for $5 on Friday. Honey Bunches of Oats comes out a little over 10% cheaper than Costco, and you get way more variety.

popularPicksVons.name: Lucerne cheese
popularPicksVons.explanation: Lucerne cheese is also in the 3-for-$5 Friday section — an easy add-on if you're already doing the Cheez-It/Post cereal deal.

popularPicksVons.name: Ritz / Wheat Thins / Triscuit
popularPicksVons.explanation: Ritz is basically Costco pricing in a smaller box. Costco is technically about 4% cheaper per ounce, but Vons lets you mix Ritz, Wheat Thins, and Triscuit instead of buying one giant box.

popularPicksVons.name: Blueberries
popularPicksVons.explanation: Blueberries are one of the clearest Costco-beaters: 18 oz would cost about $2.97 at Vons vs $5.99 at Costco.

popularPicksVons.name: Tuscan cantaloupe / watermelon
popularPicksVons.explanation: Tuscan cantaloupe is another half-price Costco comparison: Costco is about $4 each, Vons is $1.99.

popularPicksVons.name: Chobani 20g protein yogurt
popularPicksVons.explanation: Chobani 20g protein is $1 per cup at Vons this week. A 16-count equivalent is about $15.96 at Vons vs $18.99 at Costco.

popularPicksVons.name: Doritos
popularPicksVons.explanation: Doritos are close to Costco pricing depending on the bag size, but Vons wins on variety because you can mix flavors instead of buying one huge Nacho Cheese bag.

popularPicksVons.name: Nature Valley crunchy bars
popularPicksVons.explanation: Best stack: buy five Nature Valley 12-count boxes, drop the total to $15, and get 60 pouches. Costco gives you 49 for about the same price.

popularPicksVons.name: Cinnamon Toast Crunch
popularPicksVons.explanation: Cinnamon Toast Crunch also works with the stack: five boxes drops to $15 total, about $0.16/oz, slightly cheaper than Costco.

popularPicksVons.name: Nature Valley protein bars
popularPicksVons.explanation: Even Nature Valley Protein is not a Costco-beater, but it's close enough that if you want the Vons flavors and hit the stack, it's still a solid price.
